summary: The diff implements most of the required changes but has critical violations: the backend getAllSubmissions is admin-gated (contradicting REQ-20/REQ-21 which require no auth), the AdminPage still contains auth/login logic (contradicting REQ-21), and the useGetAllSubmissions hook depends on actor availability tied to authentication state rather than using a pure anonymous actor.

missing_requirements.requirement: getAllSubmissions must be accessible without authentication (no auth gate), returning all submissions as an array
missing_requirements.reason: In backend/main.mo, getAllSubmissions checks AccessControl.hasPermission for #admin and calls Runtime.trap if unauthorized. The build request explicitly states 'Do not require Internet Identity authentication for admin page viewing' and REQ-19 requires the function to return all stored submissions without access control.

missing_requirements.requirement: useGetAllSubmissions must use an anonymous actor (no authentication required) and run automatically on mount without requiring login
missing_requirements.reason: The hook uses useActor() which appears to be tied to authentication state (enabled: !!actor && !isFetching). If the actor requires login to be available, the hook will not run for unauthenticated users. The requirement explicitly says to use an anonymous actor with no dependency on Internet Identity.

missing_requirements.requirement: Admin page must load immediately without any login prompt or auth gate
missing_requirements.reason: The frontend-file-summaries.txt describes AdminPage.tsx as requiring 'admin login to view booking submissions' and showing 'a login prompt when unauthenticated'. The diff still imports useInternetIdentity and LogIn/LogOut icons, strongly indicating auth gating remains.

hallucinated_features.description: backend/migration.mo was added as a new module to handle state migration between old and new actor schemas
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention or require a migration module. This is extra infrastructure not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Admin-only access control gate on getAllSubmissions backend function
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly says not to add authentication or access control to the admin page, and REQ-19/REQ-21 require no auth. Adding an admin-only permission check on getAllSubmissions is a hallucinated feature.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration integration via 'with migration = Migration.run' clause in the actor definition
hallucinated_features.reason: No migration was requested in the build request. This feature was added without being specified.
